category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Egyptian market (EOS standards / GOEIC import control).

title.en: China-to-Egypt LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入埃及：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入埃及：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Egyptian requirements — EOS (Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality) ES standards adopting IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471, GOEIC importer and factory registration under Decree 43/2016, Egyptian appliance energy-efficiency labelling, and NTRA radio approval for smart luminaires — versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与埃及要求差距对照：埃及标准与质量组织（EOS）采纳 IEC 60598/62560/62471 的 ES 标准、GOEIC 依据第 43/2016 号法令的进口商与工厂注册、埃及家电能效标签，以及智能灯具的 NTRA 无线电核准——并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與埃及要求差距對照：埃及標準與質量組織（EOS）採納 IEC 60598/62560/62471 的 ES 標準、GOEIC 依據第 43/2016 號法令的進口商與工廠注冊、埃及家電能效標籤，以及智能燈具的 NTRA 無線電核准——並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Egyptian law, EOS (ES) standards, GOEIC registration requirements under Decree 43/2016, appliance energy-label requirements, and NTRA radio approval obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行埃及法律、EOS（ES）标准、第 43/2016 号法令下的 GOEIC 注册要求、家电能效标签要求及 NTRA 无线电核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行埃及法律、EOS（ES）標準、第 43/2016 號法令下的 GOEIC 注冊要求、家電能效標籤要求及 NTRA 無線電核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Egypt must ensure the product conforms to Egyptian EOS (ES) standards that adopt IEC 60598 (luminaire safety), IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamp safety), and IEC 62471 (photobiological safety); the Egyptian importer must be registered with GOEIC and the foreign factory must be enrolled in the GOEIC importer/factory registry under Decree 43/2016 before goods can clear customs; energy-using luminaires must carry the Egyptian appliance energy-efficiency label where the relevant ES energy-label standard applies; smart luminaires with Wi-Fi or Bluetooth require NTRA radio type approval. The Egyptian grid is 220 V single-phase at 50 Hz — the same 50 Hz as China and a similar 220 V single-phase nominal, so electrical re-rating is usually minimal. Egypt has no horizontal RoHS-style hazardous-substance restriction equivalent to China RoHS or EU RoHS as of 2026; substance control is addressed only indirectly through product safety standards. CCC certification is not recognised for Egyptian market access.
answer_first.zh: 向埃及出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须确保产品符合采纳 IEC 60598（灯具安全）、IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯安全）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）的埃及 EOS（ES）标准；货物清关前，埃及进口商须在 GOEIC 注册，且外国工厂须依据第 43/2016 号法令登入 GOEIC 进口商/工厂注册系统；在相关 ES 能效标签标准适用时，用电灯具须贴附埃及家电能效标签；具备 Wi-Fi 或蓝牙的智能灯具须取得 NTRA 无线电型号核准。埃及电网为 220 V 单相 50 Hz——与中国同为 50 Hz 且 220 V 单相标称值相近，因此电气重新定额通常很小。截至 2026 年，埃及没有相当于中国 RoHS 或欧盟 RoHS 的横向有害物质限制；物质管控仅通过产品安全标准间接涉及。CCC 认证不被埃及市场准入所认可。
answer_first.zht: 向埃及出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須確保產品符合採納 IEC 60598（燈具安全）、IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈安全）及 IEC 62471（光生物安全）的埃及 EOS（ES）標準；貨物清關前，埃及進口商須在 GOEIC 注冊，且外國工廠須依據第 43/2016 號法令登入 GOEIC 進口商/工廠注冊系統；在相關 ES 能效標籤標準適用時，用電燈具須貼附埃及家電能效標籤；具備 Wi-Fi 或藍牙的智能燈具須取得 NTRA 無線電型號核准。埃及電網為 220 V 單相 50 Hz——與中國同為 50 Hz 且 220 V 單相標稱值相近，因此電氣重新定額通常很小。截至 2026 年，埃及沒有相當於中國 RoHS 或歐盟 RoHS 的橫向有害物質限制；物質管控僅通過產品安全標準間接涉及。CCC 認證不被埃及市場准入所認可。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Egyptian regulator (EOS, GOEIC, NTRA), IEC standard reference, or primary legal source (Egyptian decree/official gazette) preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. EOS ES standard numbers and their adopted IEC editions, GOEIC registration scope under Decree 43/2016, and Egyptian energy-label thresholds must be re-verified against current official sources on each review cycle.
